title: No hit spam
description: Mutes annoying no-damage sound player hit spam.
body:
# No More Hit Spam

A lightweight client-side Fabric mod that mutes annoying no-damage player hit spam.

Perfect for no-PvP zones, spawn areas, lobbies, and protected regions where players can spam-hit you without dealing damage. The mod quiets those fake hit sounds while keeping normal PvP hit sounds when real damage is dealt.

## Features

- Mutes no-damage player attack spam
- Keeps real PvP/damage hit sounds
- Client-side only
- Lightweight
- No config needed
- Version-specific builds included

## Install

1. Download the jar that matches your Minecraft version.
2. Put it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch with Fabric.

## Supported Versions

- 1.21.1
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.8
- 1.21.11
- 26.1.1
- 26.1.2
